# r(E) = ord_{s=1} L(E,s), the ANALYTIC rank, for the height-ordered family
#   {E_{A,B}: y²=x³+Ax+B, H(E)=max(4|A|³,27B²) ≤ X, reduced, nonsingular}.
# r is OBTAINED FROM AN ORACLE (PARI/GP ellanalyticrank) — numerically
# determined; NEVER the Mordell–Weil rank (that equality is BSD, never asserted).
# Safeguard: analytic-rank parity == cached ε parity for every curve (ε=(−1)^r is
